column1: NEW | Chance of development now up to 60% over the next 2 days, 90% beyond that. NHC says watches/warnings will likely be needed for Florida later today so also expect advisories on a Potential Tropical Cyclone. This is all to be expected and is "on track" with the forecast.

The thing is that even though I’m sure Denis would be happy to help , there just isn’t any way of knowing by anyone. .I’ve been here all my life as my family before me ( I’m 85) and we’re dealing with nature.Ive seen these things stall, turn , stall again , do a u turn , you name it. Even the National Hurricane e Center ( where all the info comes from) will not say exactly until a system is closer and better developed . Even then, they will say “ expected” to do this or that. Folks are expecting way too much too soon. Years ago we didn’t know a storm was even out there till it was almost on top of us. Just stay tuned to Denis , local stations, etc and as it gets closer , or larger ( if it does) you’ll be able to judge. Otherwise , you’ll just drive yourself nuts…no one is giving absolute information because there is none…
